## Summary

What this change does and why.

## Work item

Link the work item this PR satisfies (e.g. `work/active/NNN-slug/`). Per the
contract, non-trivial changes should originate in a work item.

## Checklist

- [ ] Change stays within one owner scope (`governance/owners.json`)
- [ ] `python scripts/validate_repo.py` passes
- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests` passes
- [ ] Derived artifacts regenerated (`dashboard.md`, `SPEC.md`) and committed
- [ ] Evidence recorded under `evidence/runs/` and linked from acceptance criteria
- [ ] If a material choice was made, a decision record was added

## Frozen surface

- [ ] This PR does **not** touch the frozen surface, **or** it does and has
      maintainer approval (INV-6) — explain below.
